_comment: HOW TO ADD A NEW PRODUCT:
_comment2: 1. Copy any product object and paste at the end of the array (before the closing ])
_comment3: 2. Give it a unique 'id' (lowercase, hyphens only)
_comment4: 3. Add your image to /images/ using naming convention: item_name_color.jpeg
_comment7: 6. 'salePrice': null = no sale. Number = discounted price (original stays in 'price')
_comment8: 7. 'imageBack': set to a second filename for front/back hover swap, or null for none
_comment9: 8. 'featuredSize': 'large' = tall hero card (use once per section max)
_comment10: DONE — product auto-appears in the correct gender section with its own page.

name: Stay On Your Deen Tee
description: A reminder to stay focused on what matters. Clean script on a heavyweight tee. Wear your deen on your chest.

name: Worry About Yourself Tee
description: Mind your own business — literally. Bold, unapologetic, 100% jabi energy.

name: Sabr Tee — Black/Gold
description: Black heavyweight tee with gold Sabr calligraphy. Clean, classic, faithful.

name: Sabr Tee — White
description: White tee, black Sabr script. Street-ready and faith-forward.

name: Good Things Come to Good People Tee
description: Good Things Come to Good People — with صبر in Arabic beneath. A reminder stitched in every thread.

name: Patience Hoodie — Hot Pink
description: Hot pink. PATIENCE down the sleeve. Sabr calligraphy on the front. For the bold and the blessed.

name: Worry About Yourself Hoodie — Yellow
description: Bold yellow hoodie with red Worry About Yourself lettering. Loud, proud, and unapologetic.

name: Hijabi Baddie Hoodie — Green
description: Forest green zip hoodie with the Hijabi Baddie script logo. Subtle and signature.

name: Hijabi Baddie Hoodie — Mint
description: Mint green hoodie with pink Hijabi Baddie logo graphic. Fresh, feminine, faithful.

name: No Makeup Hoodie — White
description: White hoodie featuring the Sista Keilana 'No Makeup' graphic. Limited collab piece.

name: Hijabi Baddie Hoodie — Gold
description: Gold Hijabi Baddie hoodie. Statement piece. Limited run.

name: Hijabi Baddie Graphic Hoodie — Black
description: The Hijabi Baddie signature hoodie. B&W photo print with Parental Advisory energy. The statement piece.

name: Patience Zip Hoodie — Teal (Women's)
description: Women's fit. Black zip hoodie with teal PATIENCE running down the sleeve.

name: Patience Zip Hoodie — Teal (Men's)
description: Men's fit. Black zip hoodie with teal Sabr calligraphy on the front.

name: Sabr Hoodie — Black/Red
description: The OG. Black hoodie with red Sabr script. Spotted at Voice of Chester. This one started it all.

name: Sabr Hoodie — Forest Green (Kids)
description: Forest green kids hoodie with white Sabr calligraphy and Patience down the sleeve. Start them young.

name: Sabr Sweatsuit — Cream/Red
description: Cream sweatsuit with red Sabr script. Hoodie + matching jogger pants. The full fit, waterfront ready.
